h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to follow the tutor's prompts to identify and write down the correct force labels.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Track. [slides the track card flush under the up-arrow tail, sets the bench card off the diagram] Touching — so it pushes. Down arrow — Earth pulls the cart. Up arrow — track pushes the cart.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the physical criterion of contact to identify the force and correctly labels the diagram.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no pressure or breakdown from the learner that triggers a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is present as the tutor merely continues standard scaffolding.
